name: Pasta and Oregano| (Swmw71b) 1i21
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pot of salted water, cook the pasta until al dente.
2. Remove the sausage casing and break up the sausage in a large saucepan.
3. Add oil, garlic, and sausage to the pan. Cook for about 5 minutes.
4. Add wine and oregano, cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in cream and Parmesan cheese until the sauce boils.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Toss cooked pasta with the sauce and serve.
